| PIN_HALL_V    | RW             | Input for 0x0 Pin HALL_V function assignment | Input for 0x0 Pin HALL_V function assignment                                                                                      |
|               | 0:             | HALL_V                                       | Main function: Digital Hall Input V.                                                                                              |
|               | 1:             | AINP_V                                       | Alternate function 1: Positive Analog Input for                                                                                   |
|               | 2: 3:          | ENC2_B SCL                                   | Alternate function 2: Digital 2nd Encoder Input B. Alternate function 3: Digital Output of I/O controller;                        |
|               | 4:             | BRAKE                                        | SCL of I2C communication interface; push pull. Alternate function 4: Digital BRAKE Output.                                        |
|               | 5:             | SCL_OD                                       | Alternate function 5: Digital IO of I/O controller; SCL                                                                           |
|               | 6:             | DIG_DIFF_ENC_B_MONITOR                       | of I2C communication interface; open drain. Alternate function 6: Negative Differential Digital Input for ENC_B; Monitoring only. |
|               | 7:             | DIG_DIFF_ENC_B_N                             | Alternate function 7: Negative Differential Digital Input for ENC_B.                                                              |

| BITS & NAME     | TYPE & RESET   | TYPE & RESET                                                         | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
|-----------------|----------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| PIN_HALL_U      | RW             | 0x0                                                                  | Pin HALL_U function assignment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| PIN_HALL_U      | 0: 1: 2: 3:    | HALL_U AINP_U ENC2_A SDA                                             | Main function: Digital Hall Input U. Alternate function 1: Positive Analog Input for Analog Hall U or SinCos X. Alternate function 2: Digital 2nd Encoder Input A. Alternate function 3: Digital IO of I/O controller; SDA of I2C communication interface. Alternate function 6: Negative Differential Digital Input for ENC_A; Monitoring only. |
| PIN_HALL_U      | 6:             | DIG_DIFF_ENC_A_MONITOR                                               |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| PIN_HALL_U      | 7:             | DIG_DIFF_ENC_A_N Alternate function 7: Negative Differential Digital | DIG_DIFF_ENC_A_N Alternate function 7: Negative Differential Digital                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| [5:4] PIN_ENC_N | RW             | 0x0 Pin ENC_N function assignment                                    | 0x0 Pin ENC_N function assignment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| [5:4] PIN_ENC_N | 0: 1: 2: 3:    | ENC_N AINN_W HALL_W DIRECT_IN1_OUT1                                  | Main function: Digital Encoder Input N. Alternate function 1: Negative Analog Input for Analog HallW or SinCos Y. Alternate function 2: Digital Hall Input W. Alternate function 3: Digital Input 1 or Output 1 of I/O controller. I/O assignment is defined by the I/O Controller assignment.                                                   |
| [3:2] PIN_ENC_B | RW             | 0x0 Pin ENC_B function assignment                                    | 0x0 Pin ENC_B function assignment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| [3:2] PIN_ENC_B | 0: 1: 2: 3:    | ENC_B AINN_V HALL_V DIRECT_IN0                                       | Main function: Digital Encoder Input B. Alternate function 1: Negative Analog Input for Analog Hall V or SinCos N. Alternate function 2: Digital Hall Input V. Alternate function 3: Digital Input 0 of I/O controller.                                                                                                                          |
| [1:0] PIN_ENC_A | RW             | 0x0 Pin                                                              | ENC_A function assignment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| [1:0] PIN_ENC_A | 0: 1:          | ENC_A AINN_U                                                         | Main function: Digital Encoder Input A. Alternate function 1: Negative Analog Input for Analog Hall U or SinCos X.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| [1:0] PIN_ENC_A | 2: 3:          | HALL_U DIRECT_OUT0                                                   | Alternate function 2: Digital Hall Input U. Alternate function 3: Digital Output 0 of I/O controller.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

## 0x007: CHIP.IO\_PU\_PD

Default: 0x075800FF

Enable or disable pull-up and pull-down resistors. When writing this register, default value of not used bits must be kept.

| BITS & NAME          | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                |
|----------------------|----------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [27] PIN_UART_RXD_PD | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin UART_RXD                                                                                                          |
| [26] PIN_PWM_IN_PD   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Down at pin PWM_IN                                                                                                            |
| [25] PIN_SCK_PD      | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Down at pin SCK                                                                                                               |
| [24] PIN_SDI_PD      | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Down at pin SDI                                                                                                               |
| [22] PIN_FAULTN_PU   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin FAULTN, only active during open drain assignment.                                                                   |
| [20] PIN_SDO_PU      | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin SDO; only active if CSN='1' (SPI communication) or if output enable of I/O controller is not active for DIRECT_OUT0 |
| [19] PIN_UART_RXD_PU | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin UART_RXD                                                                                                            |
| [18] PIN_PWM_IN_PU   | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Up at pin PWM_IN                                                                                                              |
| [17] PIN_SCK_PU      | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Up at pin SCK                                                                                                                 |

| BITS & NAME        | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                     |
|--------------------|----------------|---------------------------------|
| [16] PIN_SDI_PU    | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Up at pin SDI      |
| [15] PIN_REF_R_PD  | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin REF_R  |
| [14] PIN_REF_L_PD  | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin REF_L  |
| [13] PIN_HALL_W_PD | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin HALL_W |
| [12] PIN_HALL_V_PD | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin HALL_V |
| [11] PIN_HALL_U_PD | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin HALL_U |
| [10] PIN_ENC_N_PD  | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin ENC_N  |
| [9] PIN_ENC_B_PD   | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin ENC_B  |
| [8] PIN_ENC_A_PD   | RW 0x0         | Enables Pull Down at pin ENC_A  |
| [7] PIN_REF_R_PU   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin REF_R    |
| [6] PIN_REF_L_PU   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin REF_L    |
| [5] PIN_HALL_W_PU  | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin HALL_W   |
| [4] PIN_HALL_V_PU  | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin HALL_V   |
| [3] PIN_HALL_U_PU  | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin HALL_U   |
| [2] PIN_ENC_N_PU   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin ENC_N    |
| [1] PIN_ENC_B_PU   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin ENC_B    |
| [0] PIN_ENC_A_PU   | RW 0x1         | Enables Pull Up at pin ENC_A    |

## 0x008: CHIP.IO\_CONFIG

## Default: 0x70055000

Enable and configure additional input processing capability for some pins. For instance selecting the voltage divider for the analog inputs, inverting digital input levels, or enabling digital filters to remove spurious signals.

| BITS & NAME                 | TYPE & RESET     | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|-----------------------------|------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:28] DIFF_DELAY          | RW, unsigned 0x7 | Blank time [clockCycles] for digital differential inputs: During this time span no faults is created after a level change at the inputs during DIG_DIFF_ monitoring                                      |
| [25] USE_PIN_REF_R_AS_REF_L | RW 0x0           | Pin REF_R input signal is also assigned to internal assigned REF_L signal. Use to make both REF_R and REF_L signals available with just one physical pin REF_R, e.g. to stop both direction with one pin |
| [24] USE_PIN_REF_L_AS_REF_R | RW 0x0           | Pin REF_L input signal is also assigned to internal assigned REF_R signal. Use to make both REF_R and REF_L signals available with just one physical pin REF_L, e.g. to stop both direction with one pin |

| BITS & NAME            | TYPE & RESET   | TYPE & RESET      | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                              |
|------------------------|----------------|-------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF | RW             | RW                | domain                                                                                                                                   |
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF | 0x0            |                   | Divider for analog inputs (ENC_x, HALL_x pins) in VCC_IOF                                                                                |
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF | 0:             | DIV_BY_4P5        | AnalogInput divided by 4.5                                                                                                               |
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF | 1:             | DIV_BY_3P0        | AnalogInput divided by 3.0                                                                                                               |
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF | 2:             |                   | AnalogInput divided by                                                                                                                   |
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF |                | DIV_BY_2P2        | 2.2                                                                                                                                      |
| [23:22] ANA_DIV_VCCIOF | 3:             | DIV_BY_1P0        | AnalogInput divided by 1.0                                                                                                               |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  | RW 0x0         |                   | Divider for analog inputs (PWM_IN, TEMP pins) in VCC_IO domain                                                                           |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  | 0:             | DIV_BY_4P5        | AnalogInput divided by 4.5                                                                                                               |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  | 1:             | DIV_BY_3P0        | AnalogInput divided by 3.0                                                                                                               |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  | 2:             |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  |                | DIV_BY_2P2        | AnalogInput divided by 2.2                                                                                                               |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  | 3:             | DIV_BY_1P0        | AnalogInput divided by                                                                                                                   |
| [21:20] ANA_DIV_VCCIO  |                |                   | 1.0                                                                                                                                      |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     | RW 0x1         |                   | Digital Filter Settings assigned to PWM_IN input                                                                                         |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     | 0:             | NO_FLT            | No                                                                                                                                       |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     |                |                   | filter                                                                                                                                   |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     | 1:             | FLT_1M            | Digital filter of 1 MHz                                                                                                                  |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     | 2:             | FLT_500K          | Digital filter of 500 kHz                                                                                                                |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     | 3:             |                   | Digital filter of 100 kHz                                                                                                                |
| [19:18] PWM_IN_FLT     |                | FLT_100K          |                                                                                                                                          |
| [17:16] REF_FLT        | RW 0x1         |                   | Digital Filter Settings for Reference input pins                                                                                         |
| [17:16] REF_FLT        | 0:             | NO_FLT            | No filter                                                                                                                                |
| [17:16] REF_FLT        | 1:             | FLT_1M            | Digital filter of 1 MHz                                                                                                                  |
| [17:16] REF_FLT        | 2:             | FLT_500K          | Digital filter of 500 kHz                                                                                                                |
| [17:16] REF_FLT        | 3:             | FLT_100K          | Digital filter of 100 kHz                                                                                                                |
| [15:14] HALL_FLT       | RW             |                   | Digital Filter Settings for Hall Inputs                                                                                                  |
| [15:14] HALL_FLT       | 0x1 0:         | NO_FLT            | No filter                                                                                                                                |
| [15:14] HALL_FLT       | 1:             | FLT_1M            | Digital filter of                                                                                                                        |
| [15:14] HALL_FLT       | 2:             |                   | 1 MHz Digital filter of 500 kHz                                                                                                          |
| [15:14] HALL_FLT       |                | FLT_500K          | kHz                                                                                                                                      |
| [15:14] HALL_FLT       | 3:             | FLT_100K          | Digital filter of 100                                                                                                                    |
| [13:12] ENC_FLT        | RW 0x1         |                   | Digital Filter for Encoder Inputs                                                                                                        |
| [13:12] ENC_FLT        | 0:             | NO_FLT            | No filter                                                                                                                                |
| [13:12] ENC_FLT        | 1:             | FLT_1M            | Digital filter of 1                                                                                                                      |
| [13:12] ENC_FLT        | 2:             |                   | MHz                                                                                                                                      |
| [13:12] ENC_FLT        | 3:             | FLT_500K FLT_100K | Digital filter of 500 kHz Digital filter of 100 kHz                                                                                      |
| [11]                   | RW             |                   | Inverts incoming PIN_RXD_RAW input signal for further processing.                                                                        |
| INV_PIN_RXD [10]       | 0x0 RW         |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| [9] INV_PIN_SCK        | RW 0x0         |                   | Inverts incoming PIN_SCK_RAW input signal for further processing. Not applicable for the SPI interface signal.                           |
| [8] INV_PIN_SDI        | RW 0x0         |                   | Inverts incoming PIN_SDI_RAW input signal for further processing.                                                                        |
|                        |                |                   | Not applicable for the SPI interface signal.                                                                                             |
| [7] INV_PIN_REF_R      | RW             |                   | Inverts incoming PIN_REF_R_RAW input signal for further processing.                                                                      |
| [7] INV_PIN_REF_R      | 0x0            |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| INV_PIN_REF_L [5]      | 0x0 RW         |                   | Inverts incoming PIN_REF_L_RAW input signal for further processing. Inverts incoming PIN_HALL_W_RAW input signal for further processing. |
| INV_PIN_HALL_W         | 0x0            |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| INV_PIN_HALL_V [3]     | 0x0 RW         |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| [7] INV_PIN_REF_R      |                |                   | Inverts incoming PIN_HALL_U_RAW input signal for further processing.                                                                     |
| INV_PIN_HALL_U         | 0x0            |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| [7] INV_PIN_REF_R      |                |                   |                                                                                                                                          |
| [7] INV_PIN_REF_R      |                |                   |                                                                                                                                          |

| BITS & NAME       | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                         |
|-------------------|----------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [2] INV_PIN_ENC_N | RW 0x0         | Inverts incoming PIN_ENC_N_RAW input signal for further processing. |
| [1] INV_PIN_ENC_B | RW 0x0         | Inverts incoming PIN_ENC_B_RAW input signal for further processing. |
| [0] INV_PIN_ENC_A | RW 0x0         | Inverts incoming PIN_ENC_A_RAW input signal for further processing. |

## 0x009: CHIP.STATUS\_FLAGS

Default: 0x00000000

Selection of individual or merged error condition and status bits. This register is the base for the CHIP.EVENTS register, which latches the activated state of the corresponding status bits.

| BITS & NAME                     | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|---------------------------------|----------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31] GDRV_ON_STATE              | R 0x0          | GDRV_ON Status Bit: Gate driver is active. In case certain error conditions are met, this state will be left to SYS_READY.                                                                                                                                                   |
| [30] SYS_READY_STATE            | R 0x0          | SYS_READY Status Bit: Basic ready state of the chip is active. This state is reached after power-up before gate driver stage activation (therefore, set DRV_EN pin ='1' and DRV_EN_BIT='1') and in case GDRV_ON state is left automatically due to certain error conditions. |
| [29] OVERTEMP_WARN_STATUS       | R 0x0          | In- or externally acquired temperature exceeds register based Overtemperature limit.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| [28] OV_VM_LIMIT_FAIL_STATUS    | R 0x0          | Acquired VM voltage exceeds register based overvoltage limit (UPPER_SWITCH_LIMIT).                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| [27] VM_TEMP_CLIPPED_STATUS     | R 0x0          | VM and/or external/internal Temperature value are clipped during last acquisition cycle.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| [26] AIN_CLIPPED_STATUS         | R 0x0          | Analog Input Current Value Clipped Status Bit                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| [25] I_CLIPPED_STATUS           | R 0x0          | Any Phase Current Value is Clipped during last current acquisition cycle.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| [24] CURRENT_OVERLOAD_STATUS    | R 0x0          | Actual Current surpasses register based Current Overlaod Limit                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| [23] HALL_FAIL_STATUS           | R 0x0          | Hall Fail Status Bit: All 3 Hall signals (U, V, W) are equal.                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| [22] ABN_FAIL_STATUS            | R 0x0          | ABN Fail Status Bit, combined for ABN and ABN2. Refer to particular ABN.EVENTS register.                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| [21] RAMP_REF_H_STATUS          | R 0x0          | Active REF_H condition of ramper module                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| [20] RAMP_REF_LR_STATUS         | R 0x0          | Active REF_L or REF_R condition of ramper module                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| [19] RAMP_V_ZERO_STATUS         | R 0x0          | Ramper V_ZERO Status Bit: Velocity value equals 0.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| [18] RAMP_V_REACHED_STATUS      | R 0x0          | Ramper Velocity Reached Status Bit: Velocity value matches actual postion value.                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| [17] RAMP_TARGET_REACHED_STATUS | R 0x0          | Ramper Target Reached Status Bit: Target value matches actual postion value.                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [16] RAMP_STALL_FAIL_STATUS     | R 0x0          | Active Ramper Stall condition: Position and/or velocity value exceeds assigned limits.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| [15] IO_CONTROLLER_STATUS       | R 0x0          | I/O controller is disabled, or I/O controller generated status bit is active                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [14] DIFF_ENC_FAIL_STATUS       | R 0x0          | Differential Encoder Fail Status Bit: Digital (and differentially assigned) encoder inputs are not differential                                                                                                                                                              |

| BITS & NAME                 | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                        |
|-----------------------------|----------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [13] OT_FAIL_STATUS         | R 0x0          | OverTemperature Fail Status Bit: Internal measured temperature in any phase exceeds limit. Driver output stage will be disabled as long as this over-temperature failure is active |
| [12] SHRT_FAIL_STATUS       | R 0x0          | Short Fail Status Bit: Short to GND/VS is monitored on any phase output.                                                                                                           |
| [11] VEL_FAIL_STATUS        | R 0x0          | Output frequency exceeds 600Hz limit.                                                                                                                                              |
| [10] TEMP_LIMIT_FAIL_STATUS | R 0x0          | Die Thermal Shutdown Fail Status Bit: Internally monitored temperature exceeds limit.                                                                                              |
| [9] ADC_FAIL_STATUS         | R 0x0          | ADC Fail Status Bit. Refer to ADC.STATUS register                                                                                                                                  |
| [8] EXT_RES_FAIL_STATUS     | R 0x0          | External Resistor Fail Status Bit: External resistor value is not in expected range                                                                                                |
| [7] CLK_PLL_FAIL_STATUS     | R 0x0          | Clk/PLL Fail Status Bit                                                                                                                                                            |
| [6] POWER_FAIL_STATUS       | R 0x0          | Voltage Fail Status Bit: VM and/or ChargePump not properly started                                                                                                                 |
| [5] UV_VM_STATUS            | R 0x0          | Undervoltage VM Fail Status Bit: VM voltage level is too low.                                                                                                                      |
| [4] CP_FAIL_STATUS          | R 0x0          | ChargePump Fail Status Bit                                                                                                                                                         |
| [3] VCC_IOF_FAIL_STATUS     | R 0x0          | Voltage level at VCCIOF is too low.                                                                                                                                                |
| [2] UART_FAIL_STATUS        | R 0x0          | UART Fail Status Bit: Any UART communcation error is active                                                                                                                        |
| [1] SPI_FAIL_STATUS         | R 0x0          | SPI Fail Status: Timeout or Interrupt Failure is active                                                                                                                            |
| [0] PWRUP_FAIL_STATUS       | R 0x0          | Power-up process fails                                                                                                                                                             |

## 0x00A: CHIP.EVENTS

Default: 0x00000001

Latched state of the corresponding activated status bits in CHIP.STATUS\_FLAGS register. Individual events remain set until they are actively cleared via register access. Clearing a set bit is achieved by writing a '1' to the particular bit.

| BITS & NAME                 | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                            |
|-----------------------------|----------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31] GDRV_ON_EVENT          | RW, W1C 0x0    | GDRV_ON Event, based on particular status bit                                          |
| [30] SYS_READY_EVENT        | RW, W1C 0x0    | SYS_READY Event, based on particular status bit                                        |
| [29] OVERTEMP_WARN_EVENT    | RW, W1C 0x0    | Internal or External Overtemperature Limit Fail Event, based on particular status bit. |
| [28] OV_VM_LIMIT_FAIL_EVENT | RW, W1C 0x0    | Overvoltage (VM) Limit Fail Event, based on particular status bit.                     |
| [27] VM_TEMP_CLIPPED_EVENT  | RW, W1C 0x0    | VM or Temperature Value Clipped Event, based on particular status bit                  |
| [26] AIN_CLIPPED_EVENT      | RW, W1C 0x0    | Analog Input Current Value Clipped Event, based on particular status bit.              |
| [25] I_CLIPPED_EVENT        | RW, W1C 0x0    | Phase Current Value Clipped Event, based on particular status bit.                     |
| [24] CURRENT_OVERLOAD_EVENT | RW, W1C 0x0    | Register based Current Overlaod Limit Exceeded                                         |
| [23] HALL_FAIL_EVENT        | RW, W1C 0x0    | Hall Fail Event: Clear in HALL.DIG_EVENTS register before clearing this field.         |

| BITS & NAME                    | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                    |
|--------------------------------|----------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [22] ABN_FAIL_EVENT            | RW, W1C 0x0    | ABN Fail Event, combined for ABN and ABN2, based on particular status bit. Clear in particular ABN.EVENTS register before clearing this field. |
| [21] RAMP_REF_H_EVENT          | RW, W1C 0x0    | Ramper Home Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                              |
| [20] RAMP_REF_LR_EVENT         | RW, W1C 0x0    | Ramper Reference Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                         |
| [19] RAMP_V_ZERO_EVENT         | RW, W1C 0x0    | Ramper V_ZERO Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                            |
| [18] RAMP_V_REACHED_EVENT      | RW, W1C 0x0    | Ramper Velocity Reached Event, based on particular status bit.                                                                                 |
| [17] RAMP_TARGET_REACHED_EVENT | RW, W1C 0x0    | Ramper Target Reached Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                    |
| [16] RAMP_STALL_FAIL_EVENT     | RW, W1C 0x0    | Ramper Stall Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                             |
| [15] IO_CONTROLLER_EVENT       | RW, W1C 0x0    | I/O controller Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                           |
| [14] DIFF_ENC_FAIL_EVENT       | RW, W1C 0x0    | Differential Encoder Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                |
| [13] OT_FAIL_EVENT             | RW, W1C 0x0    | OverTemperature Fail Event, based on particular status bit.                                                                                    |
| [12] SHRT_FAIL_EVENT           | RW, W1C 0x0    | Short Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                               |
| [11] VEL_FAIL_EVENT            | RW, W1C 0x0    | Velocity Fail Event, based on particular status bit.                                                                                           |
| [10] TEMP_LIMIT_FAIL_EVENT     | RW, W1C 0x0    | Die Thermal Shutdown Fail Event                                                                                                                |
| [9] ADC_FAIL_EVENT             | RW, W1C 0x0    | ADC Fail Event, based on particular status bit.                                                                                                |
| [8] EXT_RES_FAIL_EVENT         | RW, W1C 0x0    | External Resistor Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                   |
| [7] CLK_PLL_FAIL_EVENT         | RW, W1C 0x0    | Clk/PLL Fail Event, based on particular status bit.                                                                                            |
| [6] POWER_FAIL_EVENT           | RW, W1C 0x0    | Voltage Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                             |
| [5] UV_VM_EVENT                | RW, W1C 0x0    | Undervoltage VM Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                     |
| [4] CP_FAIL_EVENT              | RW, W1C 0x0    | ChargePump Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                          |
| [3] VCCIOF_FAIL_EVENT          | RW, W1C 0x0    | VCCIOF Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                              |
| [2] UART_FAIL_EVENT            | RW, W1C 0x0    | UART Fail Event                                                                                                                                |
| [1] SPI_FAIL_EVENT             | RW, W1C 0x0    | SPI Fail Event, based on particular status bit                                                                                                 |
| [0] RST_EVENT                  | RW, W1C 0x1    | Reset Event: Reset has been triggered                                                                                                          |

## 0x00B: CHIP.FAULTN\_INT\_MASK

Default: 0x00000000

Mask to select which bits of CHIP.STATUS\_FLAGS or CHIP.EVENTS registers will drive the FAULTN pin. The value in the CHIP.IO\_MATRIX.PIN\_FAULTN field determines whether the status flags bits (FAULTN\_x options) or the events bits (INT\_x options) are used to drive the output.

| BITS & NAME            | TYPE & RESET            | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|------------------------|-------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:0] FAULTN_INT_MASK | RW, unsigned 0x00000000 | Mask for selection of bits to drive the FAULTN output pin. Bits set to '1' in the mask will select the corresponding bit from CHIP.STATUS_FLAGS or CHIP.EVENTS registers. Which register is chosen is determined by the value in the CHIP.IO_MATRIX.PIN_FAULTN field. If more than one bit is set in the mask, all the corresponding bits are OR wired. |

## 0x00C: CHIP.SPI\_STATUS\_MASK

Default: 0x00000000

Mask to select which bits of CHIP.EVENTS registers will be included with each SPI command response. At most 6 bits can be selected.

| BITS & NAME            | TYPE & RESET            | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|------------------------|-------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:0] SPI_STATUS_MASK | RW, unsigned 0x00000000 | Mask for selection of bits to include in each SPI command response. Bits set to '1' in the mask will select the corresponding bit from the CHIP.EVENTS register. At most 6 bits can be selected. If more bits are selected the lower bit numbers are prior. |

## 0x040: CLK\_CTRL.CONFIG

Default: 0x00000E3C

System clocks configuration.

| BITS & NAME          | TYPE & RESET          | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
|----------------------|-----------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [12:8] CLOCK_DIVIDER | RW, unsigned 0x0E     | Clock divider for the source clock of the PLL. The input frequency for the PLL must be 1 MHz. The default value of 14 is configured for the internal oscillator (15MHz). pll_input_freq = source_clk_freq / (CLOCK_DIVIDER + 1)                                                       |
| [5] CLK_FSM_EN       | RW 0x1                | Enable the clock and PLL controller FSM. If the FSM is stuck at a certain point due to an incorrect configuration, the user must manually clear this bit to reset the FSM.                                                                                                            |
| [4] PWM_CLK_EN       | RW 0x1                | Enable 120MHzPWM clock.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| [3] ADC_CLK_EN       | RW 0x1                | Enable 60MHz ADC clock.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| [2] PLL_EN           | RW 0x1                | Select the internal oscillator clock (15MHz) or the PLL output clock (120MHz) as system master clock.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| [2] PLL_EN           | 0: INT_OSC 1: PLL     | Use the internal oscillator clock (15MHz) as source for the system clock, PWM clock and ADC clock. Use the PLL output clock (120MHz) as source for the system clock, PWM clock and ADC clock. System clock frequency = 60MHz ADC clock frequency = 60MHz PWM clock frequency = 120MHz |
| [1] PLL_SRC          | RW 0x0                | Select the internal oscillator clock (15MHz) or the external clock as input source for the PLL.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| [1] PLL_SRC          | 0: INT_CLK 1: EXT_CLK | Intern oscillator clock (15MHz) as PLL input clock. External clock as PLL input clock.                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| [0] COMMIT           | RW, W1S 0x0           | Commit the clock and PLL configuration by writing 1 to this bit. After the clock configuration is finished this bit is cleared automatically.                                                                                                                                         |

## 0x041: CLK\_CTRL.STATUS

Default: 0x00000000

Status bits and status fields related to the some of the system clocks.

| BITS & NAME             | TYPE & RESET                                    | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|-------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:24] CLK_FSM_FLG     | R, unsigned 0x00                                | This bitfield holds clk FSM current status.                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| [23:16] CLK_FSM_ERR_RPT | R 0x00 0: NO_ERR_RPT 1: NOT_USED 2: DET_ERR_RPT | In case of CLK_FSM_ERR this fields will report the error condition. No error happened. 1MHz for the PLL input clock was no longer detected while the external clock was used as the source.                                                       |
| [6] PLL_READY           | R 0x0                                           | This bit is set to 1 after the PLL configuration in finished. The 120MHz and 60MHz output clocks are generated and ready to use. If this bit is 0 the output clock of the PLL is not used. The chip is using the 15MHz internal oscillator clock. |
| [5] PLL_LOCK_ON         | R 0x0                                           | PLL locked during start-up procedure.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| [4] PLL_ERR             | R 0x0                                           | Analog PLL error occurred.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| [3] CLK_STUCK           | R 0x0                                           | PLL output clock is stuck. Watchdog is monitoring the PLL output clock with the internal oscillator clock.                                                                                                                                        |
| [2] CLK_FSM_ERR         | R 0x0                                           | Error detected by clock controller FSM. Error code can be read out at CLK_FSM_ERR_RPT. If this bit is set, the PLL is turned off and the clock controller awaits a new COMMIT.                                                                    |
| [1] CLK_1M0_TIMEOUT     | R 0x0                                           | Timeout expired while waiting for the 1MHz clock to enable the PLL.                                                                                                                                                                               |
| [0] CLK_1M0_OK          | R 0x0                                           | 1MHz for PLL input clock is detected.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

## 0x080: ADC.CONFIG

Default: 0x00000400

ADC configuration. When writing this register, the default value of the not used bits must be kept.

| BITS & NAME           | TYPE & RESET     | DESCRIPTION                                                                                        |
|-----------------------|------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [11:8] CSA_AZ_FLT_EXP | RW, unsigned 0x4 | Filter length exponent of digital filter (moving average style) for all raw AZ (Auto-zero) values. |
| [3] NRST_ADC_1        | RW 0x0 0: RESET  | Low active software reset of ADC1. Reset I/O controller after resetting any ADC. ADC1 is reset.    |
| [2]                   | RW 0x0 0:        | Low active software reset of ADC0. Reset I/O controller after resetting any ADC.                   |
| NRST_ADC_0            | RESET 1: ENABLE  | ADC0 is reset. ADC0 is enabled.                                                                    |

## 0x081: ADC.ADC\_VERSION

Default: 0x00000002

ADC version no.

| BITS & NAME           | TYPE & RESET           | DESCRIPTION     |
|-----------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
| [31:0] VERSION_NUMBER | R, unsigned 0x00000002 | ADC version no. |

## 0x082: ADC.I2\_I1\_RAW

Default: 0x00000000

Raw phase current I2 and I1 values.

| BITS & NAME   | TYPE & RESET      | DESCRIPTION           |
|---------------|-------------------|-----------------------|
| [31:16] I2    | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw Phase current I2. |
| [15:0] I1     | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw Phase current I1. |

## 0x083: ADC.VM\_I3\_RAW

Default: 0x00000000

Raw supply voltage and phase current I3 values.

| BITS & NAME   | TYPE & RESET      | DESCRIPTION                          |
|---------------|-------------------|--------------------------------------|
| [31:16] VM    | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw Analog Voltage Monitoring value. |
| [15:0] I3     | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw Phase current I3.                |

## 0x084: ADC.TEMP\_RAW

Default: 0x00000000

Raw internal die temperature value and raw voltage value at TEMP analog input pin.

| BITS & NAME      | TYPE & RESET      | DESCRIPTION                                                                      |
|------------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16] TEMP_INT | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw Internal Die Temperature.                                                    |
| [15:0]           | RW, signed        | Raw voltage value for external temperature measurement at TEMP analog input pin. |
| TEMP_EXT         | 0x0000            |                                                                                  |

## 0x085: ADC.AIN\_V\_AIN\_U\_RAW

Default: 0x00000000

Raw voltage value for position feedback analog sensors.

| BITS & NAME   | TYPE & RESET      | DESCRIPTION                                                               |
|---------------|-------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16]       | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw analog input for pin HALL_V (with alternate function) (optionally the |
| AIN_V         |                   | raw analog differential input between pins HALL_V and ENC_B)              |
| [15:0]        | RW, signed        | Raw analog input for pin HALL_U (with alternate function) (optionally the |
| AIN_U         | 0x0000            | raw analog differential input between pins HALL_U and ENC_A)              |

## 0x086: ADC.AIN\_AIN\_W\_RAW

Default: 0x00000000

Raw voltage value for position feedback analog sensors.

| BITS & NAME   | TYPE & RESET      | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                            |
|---------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16] AIN   | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw analog input AIN                                                                                                                   |
| [15:0] AIN_W  | RW, signed 0x0000 | Raw analog input for pin HALL_W (with alternate function) (optionally the raw analog differential input between pins HALL_W and ENC_N) |

## 0x08A: ADC.STATUS

Default: 0x00000000

ADC status bits

| BITS & NAME                | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                                         |
|----------------------------|----------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31] I123_FAIL             | R 0x0          | Sum of all raw phase currents exceeds the absolute limit set in ADC.I123.I123_LIMIT register field. |
| [30] NO_ACK_ADC            | RW, W1C 0x0    | ADC acknowledged not correctly.                                                                     |
| [27] USE_ADC_EXT_VALID_EXT | RW 0x0         | ADC_EXT_VALID_EXT will be used for feedback engine, not internally generated ADC_EXT_VALID.         |
| [26] ADC_EXT_VALID_EXT     | RW 0x0         | Externally generated ADC_EXT_VALID signal.                                                          |
| [25] USE_ADC_I_VALID_EXT   | RW 0x0         | ADC_I_VALID_EXT will be used for FOC engine, not internally generated ADC_I_VALID.                  |
| [24] ADC_I_VALID_EXT       | RW 0x0         | Externally generated ADC_I_VALID signal.                                                            |
| [23] ADC_EXT_VALID         | R 0x0          | Indication that external ADC measurement is completed.                                              |
| [22] ADC_I_VALID           | R 0x0          | Indication that CSA measurements have been completed.                                               |
| [21] AIN_DONE              | RW, W1C 0x0    | AIN channel measurement is done.                                                                    |
| [20] AIN_W_DONE            | RW, W1C 0x0    | Analog measurement at pin HALL_W is done.                                                           |
| [19] AIN_V_DONE            | RW, W1C 0x0    | Analog measurement at pin HALL_V is done.                                                           |
| [18] AIN_U_DONE            | RW, W1C 0x0    | Analog measurement at pin HALL_U is done.                                                           |
| [17] I3_DONE               | RW, W1C 0x0    | ADC measurement for I3 done.                                                                        |
| [16] I2_DONE               | RW, W1C 0x0    | ADC measurement for I2 done.                                                                        |
| [15] I1_DONE               | RW, W1C 0x0    | ADC measurement for I1 done.                                                                        |
| [14] TEMP_EXT_DONE         | RW, W1C 0x0    | Raw analog value measurement of external temperature input pin TEMP is done.                        |
| [13] TEMP_EXT_CLIPPED      | RW, W1C 0x0    | Raw analog value for external temperature input pin TEMP is clipped.                                |
| [12] TEMP_INT_DONE         | RW, W1C 0x0    | Raw Internal Die Temperature measurement is done.                                                   |
| [11] TEMP_INT_CLIPPED      | RW, W1C 0x0    | Raw Internal Die Temperature value is clipped.                                                      |
| [10] VM_DONE               | RW, W1C 0x0    | Raw Analog Voltage Monitoring measurement is done.                                                  |

| BITS & NAME       | TYPE & RESET   | TYPE & RESET                                                                                 | DESCRIPTION                                                                                  |
|-------------------|----------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [9] VM_CLIPPED    | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | Raw Analog Voltage Monitoring value is clipped.                                              |
| [8] AIN_CLIPPED   | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | AIN channel value is clipped.                                                                |
| [7] AIN_W_CLIPPED | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | Analog measurement at pin HALL_W clipped.                                                    |
| [6] AIN_V_CLIPPED | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | Analog measurement at pin HALL_V clipped.                                                    |
| [5] AIN_U_CLIPPED | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | Analog measurement at pin HALL_U clipped.                                                    |
| [4] I3_CLIPPED    | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | ADC value for I3 is clipped.                                                                 |
| [3] I2_CLIPPED    | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | ADC value for I2 is clipped.                                                                 |
| [2] I1_CLIPPED    | RW, W1C 0x0    | RW, W1C 0x0                                                                                  | ADC value for I1 is clipped.                                                                 |
| [1] ADC_1_READY   | R 0x0          | R 0x0                                                                                        | ADC1 ready status bit                                                                        |
| [1] ADC_1_READY   | 0: 1:          | ONGOING ADC_1 calibration ongoing. READY ADC_1 is calibrated and ready for normal operation. | ONGOING ADC_1 calibration ongoing. READY ADC_1 is calibrated and ready for normal operation. |
| [0] ADC_0_READY   | R 0x0          | R 0x0                                                                                        | ADC0 ready status bit                                                                        |
| [0] ADC_0_READY   | 0: 1:          | ONGOING ADC_0 calibration ongoing. READY ADC_0 is calibrated and ready for normal operation. | ONGOING ADC_0 calibration ongoing. READY ADC_0 is calibrated and ready for normal operation. |

0x08C: ADC.I123

Default: 0xFFFF0000

Sum of all current values

| BITS & NAME        | TYPE & RESET        | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                          |
|--------------------|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16] I123_LIMIT | RW, unsigned 0xFFFF | Limit for the sum of all raw phase currents' absolute value before triggering the ADC.STATUS.I123_FAIL register bit. |
| [15:0] I123        | R, signed 0x0000    | All Raw Phase currents added.                                                                                        |

## 0x0C0: MCC\_ADC.I\_GEN\_CONFIG

Default: 0x00000000

General Configuration of the current ADCs. When writing this register, the default value of the not used bits must be kept.

| BITS & NAME    | TYPE & RESET        | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
|----------------|---------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [13:12] STATUS | R, unsigned 0x0     | Autokirchhoff calculation status: 0= no current calculation is replaced. If this value is greater than 0, the particular phase no., which current measurement is replaced by Autkirchhoff feature, is forwarded (1= IU, 2= IV, 3= IW).                                                                                                     |
| [0] MEAS_MODE  | RW 0x0              | Current measurement mode                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| [0] MEAS_MODE  | 0: AUTOMATIC_SWITCH | Auto Kirchhoff feature is enabled: Current measurement with highest PWM duty cycle may be skipped (dependent on AUTO_KIRCHHOFF_LIM) and calculated with the help of the two other phase current values. Auto Kirchhoff feature is disabled: All current measurement values are directly transferred to the corresponding FOC input values. |
| [0] MEAS_MODE  | 1: NO_SWITCH        |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |

0x0C1: MCC\_ADC.IW\_IU

Default: 0x00000000

Scaled and offset compensated ADC measurements for U and W phase currents, as sent to the FOC module.

| BITS & NAME   | TYPE & RESET     | DESCRIPTION                                                           |
|---------------|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16] IW    | R, signed 0x0000 | Scaled and offset compensated ADC measurement for the Wphase current. |

0x0C2: MCC\_ADC.IV

Default: 0x00000000

Scaled and offset compensated ADC measurement for the V phase current, as sent to the FOC module.

| BITS & NAME   | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                   |
|---------------|----------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|
| [15:0]        | R, signed      | Scaled and offset compensated ADC measurement for the V phase |
| IV            | 0x0000         | current.                                                      |

0x0C3: MCC\_ADC.CSA\_GAIN

Default: 0x00000000

CSA gain configurations.

| BITS & NAME          | TYPE & RESET            | DESCRIPTION                                 |
|----------------------|-------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| [15:8] DYN_GAIN_HYST | RW, unsigned 0x00       | Hysteresis of Dynamic Gain Selection        |
| [6] DYN_GAIN_4X_EN   | RW 0x0                  | Enables dynamic gain factor 4x.             |
| [5] DYN_GAIN_3X_EN   | RW 0x0                  | Enables dynamic gain factor 3x.             |
| [4] DYN_GAIN_2X_EN   | RW 0x0                  | Enables dynamic gain factor 2x.             |
| [3:2] DYN_GAIN_ACT   | R, unsigned 0x0         | Actual Gain Factor                          |
| [1:0] CSA_GAIN       | 0: X1 1: X2 2: X3 3: X4 | CSA Gain=1 CSA Gain=2 CSA Gain=3 CSA Gain=4 |

0x0C4: MCC\_ADC.EVENTS

Default: 0x00000000

Status bits and events for some ADC measurements.

| BITS & NAME                 | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                   |
|-----------------------------|----------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [6] CURRENT_OVERLOAD_STATUS | R 0x0          | Status of current measurement comparison with the soft overload limit value set in MCC_ADC.CURRENT_OVERLOAD register.         |
| [5] TEMP_INT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED | R 0x0          | Status of internal temperature comparison with the soft limit value set in MCC_ADC.TEMP_LIMITS.TEMP_INT_LIMIT register field. |
| [4] TEMP_EXT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED | R 0x0          | Status of external temperature comparison with the soft limit value set in MCC_ADC.TEMP_LIMITS.TEMP_EXT_LIMIT register field. |
| [1] MEAS_DONE               | RW, W1C 0x0    | Current Measurement Done flag (MCC_ADC processing). Write a '1' to clear the bit.                                             |
| [0] ADC_CLIPPED             | RW, W1C 0x0    | This bit is set if any ADC measurement was clipped. Write a '1' to clear the bit.                                             |

## 0x0C5: MCC\_ADC.DYN\_GAIN\_LIMITS\_4X\_3X

Default: 0x40008000

Current limits for automatic gain switching

| BITS & NAME               | TYPE & RESET        | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                |
|---------------------------|---------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16] DYN_GAIN_LIMIT_4X | RW, unsigned 0x4000 | Current limit value after which a 4x gain is automatically switched to the next lower active dynamic gain. |
| [15:0] DYN_GAIN_LIMIT_3X  | RW, unsigned 0x8000 | Current limit value after which a 3x gain is automatically switched to the next lower active dynamic gain. |

0x0C6: MCC\_ADC.DYN\_GAIN\_LIMIT\_2X

Default: 0x0000C000

Current limits for automatic gain switching

| BITS & NAME       | TYPE & RESET   | DESCRIPTION                                                                |
|-------------------|----------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [15:0]            | RW, unsigned   | Current limit value after which a 2x gain is automatically switched to the |
| DYN_GAIN_LIMIT_2X | 0xC000         | next lower active dynamic gain.                                            |

0x0C7: MCC\_ADC.TEMP\_LIMITS

Default: 0xFFFFFFFF

Soft temperature ADC measurement limits. Values can be set as a threshold to trigger particular status bits.

| BITS & NAME            | TYPE & RESET        | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                        |
|------------------------|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [31:16] TEMP_INT_LIMIT | RW, unsigned 0xFFFF | Soft limit for the internal die temperature ADC measurement, which, if exceeded, triggers the MCC_ADC.EVENTS.TEMP_INT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED register bit. |
| [15:0] TEMP_EXT_LIMIT  | RW, unsigned 0xFFFF | Soft limit for the TEMP pin ADC measurement, which, if exceeded, triggers the MCC_ADC.EVENTS.TEMP_EXT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED register bit.                 |

0x0C8: MCC\_ADC.CURRENT\_OVERLOAD

Default: 0x0000FFFF

Soft current ADC measurement limits. A value can be set as a threshold to trigger a particular status bit.

| BITS & NAME             | TYPE & RESET        | DESCRIPTION                                                                                                                                                                |
|-------------------------|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [15:0] CURRENT_OVERLOAD | RW, unsigned 0xFFFF | Soft limit for ADC measurement for any of the phase currents(IU, IV, IW), which triggers the MCC_ADC.EVENTS.CURRENT_OVERLOAD_STATUS register bit if the limit is exceeded. |

0x100: MCC\_CONFIG.MOTOR\_MOTION

Default: 0x00000000

|-------------------------------------|----------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| [19] VELOCITY_FF_EN                 | RW 0x0         | Enable feedforward of RAMPER.RAMPER_VELOCITY value to the velocity PID controller. Enable only while in MOTION_MODE=POSITION, must be disabled otherwise.     |
| [18] TORQUE_FF_VISC_FRIC_EN         | RW 0x0         | Consider the torque feedforward viscous friction component (torque_ff_visc_fric) when calculating the value of the MCC_CONFIG.TORQUE_FEEDFORWARD register.    |
| [17] TORQUE_FF_COULOMB_FRI CTION_EN | RW 0x0         | Consider the torque feedforward Coulomb friction component (torque_ff_coulomb_fric) when calculating the value of the MCC_CONFIG.TORQUE_FEEDFORWARD register. |
